nasb.text: Do not neglect the spiritual gift within you, which was bestowed on you through prophetic utterance with the laying on of hands by the presbytery.

esv.text: Do not neglect the gift you have, which was given you by prophecy when the council of elders laid their hands on you.

cnv.text: 不要忽略你所得的恩賜，就是眾長老按手時藉著預言賜給你的。

ccb.text: 不要忽略你的恩赐，那是借着预言在众长老把手按在你身上时赐给你的。

csbs.text: 不要忽视在你里面的恩赐；这恩赐是藉着预言，随着长老们的按手赐给你的。
